message:
fix: Config parsing for array-of-objects dirs format + $HOME/$PWD expansion

- Fix config parsing to support new dirs format: [{"path": "/tmp", "read": true, ...}]
- Add $HOME and $PWD expansion in expandPath()
- Make polyfill debug prints conditional via _polyfillDebug flag
- Comment out verbose spawn debug prints in edgebox_wamr.zig
- Make runtime.js debug prints conditional on _edgebox_debug

This fixes .edgebox.json loading for Claude Code integration.
